title: azanza garckeana
intro: Azanza garckeana, also known as bush mango or African mango, is a tropical plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant's leaves, bark, and seeds possess medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Azanza garckeana are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Azanza garckeana can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
